Template for nrfx macros and build script for nRF52840 microcontroller.


## Files
- **[nrfx_glue.h](nrfx_glue.h.md)**: Template for implementing nrfx macros for IRQ handling, atomic operations, and cache management.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Configuration and build script for the nRF52840 microcontroller in the Pebble firmware.
